movie.actors: Pierce Brosnan, Halle Berry, Toby Stephens, Rosamund Pike
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Golden Globe. Another 6 wins & 34 nominations.
movie.language: English, Korean, Cantonese, Spanish, German, Icelandic, Italian, Arabic
movie.plot: James Bond is sent to investigate the connection between a North Korean terrorist and a diamond mogul, who is funding the development of an international space weapon.
movie.title: Die Another Day
movie.writer: Ian Fleming (characters), Neal Purvis, Robert Wade
